Jean-Honoré Fragonard

26 works in the gallery.
Click any image to enlarge. Use ← → or close with Esc.
View of the Park in Saint-Cloud
by Jean-Honoré Fragonard
France · 1732–1806 · Brush and brown ink and brown wash

by Jean-Honoré Fragonard
France, 18th century · c. 1760 · pen and brown and gray ink, brush and brown and gray wash, and traces of yellow watercolor over black chalk; framing lines in black ink

by Jean-Honoré Fragonard

by Jean-Honoré Fragonard

Angel Holding a Palm and a Crown
by Jean-Honoré Fragonard

The Swing
by Jean-Honoré Fragonard
Jean-Honoré Fragonard · 1767 · Wallace Collection
A young woman kicks off her slipper while her hidden lover peeks up her billowing dress — the jilted bishop pushing the swing behind her. The Baron de Saint-Julien commissioned it explicitly to stage this visual joke at his mistress's expense.
Portrait of a Man in Costume
by Jean-Honoré Fragonard
France · Flemish · 1767–1768 · Oil on canvas

by Jean-Honoré Fragonard

by Jean-Honoré Fragonard
France · 1773–1783 · Brush and brown ink and brown wash on ivory laid paper

by Jean-Honoré Fragonard

Satyr Pressing Grapes Beside a Tiger
by Jean-Honoré Fragonard
